title: y-cluster-serve.yaml
description: Configuration for `y-cluster serve`. One file per `-c` directory.

port.description: TCP port this server binds. Each `-c` config gets its own port; name-based vhosting is not supported.

root.description: Path prefix under which the dir appears in HTTP. Empty means served at /.

yamlToJson.description: Transform application/yaml responses to application/json. Off by default.

dirTrailingSlash.description: Behavior when a dir path is requested without trailing slash.

sources.description: Parameters for type=y-kustomize-local. Each source contributes files under y-kustomize-bases/ which map to /v1/{group}/{name}/{file}.

inCluster.description: Parameters for type=y-kustomize-incluster. Watches Kubernetes Secrets named `y-kustomize.{group}.{name}` and serves their data keys at `/v1/{group}/{name}/{key}`.

namespace.description: Namespace to watch. Empty: pod namespace when in-cluster, else kubeconfig context namespace, else 'default'.

labelSelector.description: Label selector for Secret filtering. Default: yolean.se/module-part=y-kustomize.
